item.title: About
item.description: Hi there My name is Adrian von Arx and I’m a Team Leader Red Teaming and Penetration Testing. I’m a Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP) and OSSTMM Professional Security Tester (OPST). You can find me here: https://twitter.com/avarx_ https://www.twitch.tv/avarx_ https://github.com/avarx/ https://www.linkedin.com/in/adrian-von-arx/
item.content:
Hi there

My name is Adrian von Arx and I’m a Team Leader Red Teaming and Penetration Testing. I’m a Offensive Security Certified Professional (OSCP) and OSSTMM Professional Security Tester (OPST).

You can find me here:

  • https://twitter.com/avarx_
  • https://www.twitch.tv/avarx_
  • https://github.com/avarx/
  • https://www.linkedin.com/in/adrian-von-arx/

item.title: CVE
item.description: My CVE CVE for personal reference: CVE-2019-12823 | XSS in Craft CMS CVE-2020-7033 | XSS on the Unified Portal Client used in Avaya CVE-2020-28246 | Coming soon
item.content:
My CVE

CVE for personal reference:

  • CVE-2019-12823 | XSS in Craft CMS
  • CVE-2020-7033 | XSS on the Unified Portal Client used in Avaya
  • CVE-2020-28246 | Coming soon
